name: pi-agent-orchestrator
description: Multi-agent orchestration extension for Pi. Spawn specialized sub-agents with isolated context windows, custom prompts, and targeted skills. Includes a real-time web dashboard.

scripts.build: bun build --target=browser --minify --define 'process.env.NODE_ENV="production"' --outdir=web web/app.tsx && bunx tailwindcss -i web/tailwind.css -o web/app.css --minify
scripts.check: bun run lint && bun run build && bun test
